body:
## What changed

- Added focused `validate-content` coverage for Pro-gated learning selectors.
- Hardened `remainingDailyReviews()` so only `isPro === true` unlocks unlimited review and malformed caps/counts stay finite.
- Added validator routing coverage and fixed the storage test harness so captured Zustand state remains live.

## Why

The release validator now checks the same strict Pro behavior covered by the direct review and highlight store tests: malformed Pro flags remain Free, invalid caps/counts do not leak `NaN` or `Infinity`, and paid highlight colors stay locked unless Pro is explicitly boolean `true`.

## Validation

- `node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-learning-pro-gated-selectors`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js tests/v1-1-review-store.test.js tests/v1-1-highlights-store.test.js --test-name-pattern "learning Pro|remainingDailyReviews|isColorAllowed|strict boolean|freeCap|highlight color|NaN|Infinity"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run lint`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:ownership`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] Validate Pro-gated learning selectors
